channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Video shows seaplane crash off Washington state
item.description: Dramatic video captured the moment a tourist floatplane carrying 11 people crashed off the Washington coast near Seattle. Everyone on board survived.

item.title: Trump's hunt for leverage over Saudi Arabia fuels nuclear proliferation concerns
item.description: The historic nuclear energy deal between the U.S. and Saudi Arabia has raised concern from nuclear proliferation experts.

item.title: DNC panel recommends South Carolina hold the 1st presidential primary in 2028
item.description: The Democratic Party took a key step Friday towards determining its calendar for the first set of presidential nominating primaries and caucuses in th...

item.title: US measles cases hit 2,318 in 2026, surpassing last year's total, CDC data shows
item.description: The number of confirmed measles cases in the U.S. has hit 2,318, surpassing the total reported for all last year, according to newly updated data from...
